name: Gallery
description: A community media gallery supporting images, videos, and embeds with collections, ratings, comments, reactions, and subscriptions.
author: billyrayfoss

gallery_enabled.label: Gallery enabled
gallery_enabled.description: Show Gallery in the Explore sidebar and make all routes accessible.

ratings_enabled.label: Ratings enabled
ratings_enabled.description: Allow members to give 1–5 star ratings on images, videos, and collections.

comments_enabled.label: Comments enabled
comments_enabled.description: Allow members to comment on gallery items and collections.

reactions_enabled.label: Reactions enabled
reactions_enabled.description: Allow members to react to gallery items and collections with emoji.

videos_enabled.label: Video uploads enabled
videos_enabled.description: Allow members to upload video files (MP4, WebM). Disabled by default — requires sufficient storage.

moderation_queue_enabled.label: Moderation queue
moderation_queue_enabled.description: New uploads go into a pending queue and require admin approval before appearing publicly.

harvest_enabled.label: Image harvest enabled
harvest_enabled.description: Scan new and edited posts for embedded images and create draft gallery items automatically.

max_tags_per_item.label: Max tags per item
max_tags_per_item.description: Maximum number of tags a member can apply to a single image, video, or embed.

max_collection_size.label: Max collection size
max_collection_size.description: Maximum number of items a collection can contain.

max_video_size_mb.label: Max video size (MB)
max_video_size_mb.description: Per-file size cap for video uploads. Nexus's global upload limit also applies.

permissions.label: Comment on gallery items and collections
React to gallery items and collections
Manage gallery settings, tags, and harvest config

notification_types.label: Gallery comment
notification_types.description: Someone commented on your gallery item or collection.

notification_types.label: Gallery rating
notification_types.description: Someone rated your gallery item or collection.

notification_types.label: New gallery image
notification_types.description: A new image was added to a tag you follow.
